scripts.css:build:admin: npx tailwindcss -c tailwind-admin-debug.config.js -i booking/static/css/admin-input.css -o booking/static/css/admin-debug.css --minify && npx tailwindcss -c tailwind-admin-dashboard.config.js -i booking/static/css/admin-input.css -o booking/static/css/admin-dashboard.css --minify
scripts.css:build:all: npm run css:build && npm run css:build:admin
